title: oxalis macrantha
intro: Oxalis macrantha, also known as the fire lily or purple wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Oxalis macrantha include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as providing relief from pain and discomfort. Oxalis macrantha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
